response.justification: Bogdan has over 10 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and demonstrated ownership of end-to-end systems, including AI-agent infrastructure and scalable backend services, with clear evidence of testing rigor, cloud usage (AWS CDK), and architectural thinking — though limited direct Nest.js and Vitest exposure is a minor gap.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across modern and legacy systems
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and scalable backend services
Strong testing culture and open-source contributions demonstrating craftsmanship
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest in resume
No clear evidence of direct collaboration with product/design teams
German language proficiency is basic, may impact local team integration
